top_signals.title: Aryna Sabalenka left wanting to ’quit tennis’ after shocking French Open collapse
top_signals.summary: Aryna Sabalenka said she fell into a "deep, dark hole" during her three-set loss to Russian ⁠Diana Shnaider in the French Open quarterfinals on Wednesday, after the world No. 1 let her opportunities slip in the second set.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Deadly Screwworm Parasite Found in US Threatens Cattle Herd
top_signals.summary: A deadly cattle parasite was confirmed in the US for the first time in nearly a decade, posing the latest threat to a US herd already at its lowest level in 75 years.

top_signals.title: South Korea's ruling party win big in local elections
Computacenter joins FTSE 100 in reshuffle as index builds tech exposure
top_signals.summary: The latest quarterly reshuffle of the FTSE 100 has seen Computacenter, Investec and Aberdeen promoted to the top-tier index of the City’s most valuable companies, bringing a constituent with some direct exposure to the artificial intelligence boom to the City’s most famous benchmark. Computacenter’s rise from the FTSE 250 to blue-chip status looks somewhat like [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
